## Layer 2 — Use Cases (UC)
<!-- Who does what with the system?                                   -->
<!-- One section per use case. PO can still read and correct this.   -->
<!-- AI reads this to understand behaviour before writing code.       -->

### UC-01: [Use Case Name]

**Actor:** [who initiates this — role, not person]
**Trigger:** [what causes this use case to start]

**Main Flow:**
1. [step]
2. [step]
3. [step]

**Alternative Flows:**
- [N]a. [condition]: [what happens instead]

**Exceptions:**
- E[N]. [condition]: [system response]

## Layer 3 — Entity Model
<!-- What are the domain nouns?                                       -->
<!-- Not an ERD. No datatypes, no indexes, no foreign keys yet.      -->
<!-- Focus on names, meanings, states, and relationships.            -->
<!-- Use the exact terms the team will use in code.                  -->

### [EntityName]
- **Represents:** [one sentence on what this entity is]
- **States:** [state-a], [state-b], [state-c]
- **Fields (conceptual):**
  - `id` — stable UUID assigned at creation
  - `[field]` — [what it means in business terms]
  - `[field]` — [what it means in business terms]
- **Relationships:**
  - Belongs to: [OtherEntity] (nullable / required)
  - Has many: [OtherEntity]

## Layer 4 — Acceptance Criteria (AC)
<!-- How do we know it is done correctly?                             -->
<!-- One AC per scenario. Each AC maps to exactly one Maestro flow.  -->
<!-- Every AC MUST have a → e2e: forward link.                       -->
<!-- No two ACs may share the same flow file path.                   -->

### UC-01: [Use Case Name]

#### AC-1: [Scenario title — specific enough to become a test]
→ e2e: `e2e/flows/[feature]/UC-01-[slug]/AC-1-[slug].yaml`
→ test-name: `UC-01_AC-1_[slug]`

**Given:** [precondition — what is true before the action]
**When:** [the action the user or system takes]
**Then:** [observable outcome — what the user sees or what the system does]
**And:** [additional assertion if needed]

#### AC-2: [Scenario title]
→ e2e: `e2e/flows/[feature]/UC-01-[slug]/AC-2-[slug].yaml`
→ test-name: `UC-01_AC-2_[slug]`

**Given:**
**When:**
**Then:**
